briefdescription.para: A New Announce Packet has been written to this device to transmit.

detaileddescription.para: We need to decode it and rerun the Best Master Clock Algorithm (BMCA)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAvb instance to be worked on

simplesect.para: None. But an updated True/False decision as to whether this device should operate as a clock master or a slave is written into the CurrentBmc data structure.

inbodydescription.para: Read the attributes for the new Announce frame in the Tx PTP buffer
Compare the clock attributes between then new Announce frame and the current master
Update records with the NEW best master
Our new Tx Announce Packet has won - so this device must be the master

briefdescription.para: A New Announce Packet has been received.

detaileddescription.para: We need to decode it and rerun the Best Master Clock Algorithm (BMCA)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAvb instance to be worked on
is the base address of the received Announce Packet in the Rx PTP Packet Buffer

simplesect.para: None. But an updated True/False decision as to whether this device should operate as a clock master or a slave is written into the CurrentBmc data structure.

inbodydescription.para: Read the attributes for the new Announce frame received
If the received packet's clockIdentity matches our clockIdentity, ignore the packet
If the received packet's stepsRemoved field is >= 255, ignore the packet
If the Announce packet's GMID matches that of our current GM record, then update its records based on the current packet, just in case something (such as priority) has changed.
update timeout information
Compare against this device's information to see if we should be GM
run BMCA on this announce to see if it is better than me
Update records with the NEW best master
Capture the Announce Receipt Timeout Interval. Reset the announce receipt timeout interval to use the new value.
New Rx Announce Packet has won - so this device cannot be a master

briefdescription.para: A New Announce Packet is to be analyzed.

detaileddescription.para: This function will read in the packet, decode it, and extract the relevant information fields to the "AnnounceFrame" data pointer.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the base address of the received Announce Packet in the Rx PTP Packet Buffer
is a pointer to a suitable data structure, designed to record the useful fields from the received Announce Packet

simplesect.para: The AnnounceFrame data structure is updated.

inbodydescription.para: Get the Source Port Identity of the port sending the Announce Packet
Read priority1 and top half of ClockQuality
Read bottom half of ClockQuality, priority2, and top byte of GMID
Read bytes 4-7 of GMID
Read bytes 1-3 of GMID and high byte of stepsRemoved
Read low byte of stepsRemoved

briefdescription.para: This function reads the logMessageinteval from an RX PTP Buffer and updates the AnnounceFrame struct with the value read.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the device
is the base address of the received Announce Packet in the Rx PTP Packet Buffer
is a pointer to a suitable data structure, designed to record the useful fields from the received Announce Packet

simplesect.para: The AnnounceFrame data structure is updated.

briefdescription.para: This function will accept the data pointer to the current BMCA records, accept a pointer to an equivalent data structure for the new Announce Packet.

detaileddescription.para: The Best Master Clock Algorithm (BMCA) is then performed on these two data structures by comparing the data fields

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to a suitable data structure, designed to record the current fields from the current Grand Master's Announce Packet.
is a pointer to a suitable data structure, designed to record the useful fields from the received Announce Packet

simplesect.para: An updated True/False decision as to whether there is to be a change of Grand Master in the network.

inbodydescription.para: Priority1 takes precedence over all over priorites
we have found a better master!
convert structs to u32 values for easy comparison
ClockQuality has the next priority
we have found a better master!
Priority2 provides fine grained ordering amongst otherwise equal clocks
we have found a better master!
Next compare the Clock Identities
we have found a better master!
we have found a better master!
Next compare stepsRemoved
we have found a better master!
Next compare SourcePortIdentity
we have found a better master!
we have found a better master!
If all else fails, the SourcePortIdentity Port Number must act as the tie-breaker
A new master has won on the tie-break!

briefdescription.para: This function will accept the data pointer to the current BMCA records, accept an equivalent pointer to a new (winning) Grand Masters Announce Packet information.

detaileddescription.para: The CurrentBmc data structure is then updated with the information from the NewMaster.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to a suitable data structure which has recorded the relevant Announce Packet fields of the new (winning) Grand Master.
is a pointer to a suitable data structure which has recorded the current fields of the current Grand Master's Announce Packet.

simplesect.para: The CurrentBmc data structure is updated.

briefdescription.para: This function will make any adjustments needed when the node becomes the Grand Master, including resetting the RTC to its nominal value.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAvb instance to be worked on
indicates that this function has been called from the function XAvb_DecodeTxAnnounceFrame(). Is this is set then this function has no need to repeat actions that have been already performed.

inbodydescription.para: Update the BMCA records to this device's information
Read the attributes in the Tx PTP buffer
Update records
reset the RTC to a nominal value
set timestamp uncertainty if new status
inform the rest of the system

briefdescription.para: This function will make any adjustments needed when the node becomes a PTP slave.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAvb instance to be worked on

inbodydescription.para: set timestamp uncertainty if new status

briefdescription.para: Operations needed when PTP locks or unlocks.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAvb instance to be worked on
is 1 if changing to locked status, zero if unlocked

inbodydescription.para: set status variable
set timestamp uncertainty if necessary

briefdescription.para: Operations needed when the peer's AS capability changes.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAvb instance to be worked on
is 1 if the peer is ASCapable, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: This function sets the handler that will be called when a GM discontinuity event is identified by the driver.

detaileddescription.para: The purpose of the handler is to allow application specific processing to be performed.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAvb instance.
is the pointer to the callback function.
is the upper layer callback reference passed back when the callback function is invoked.

simplesect.para: There is no assert on the CallBackRef since the driver doesn't know what it is (nor should it)

detaileddescription.para: Functions in this file all relate to the Best Master Clock Algorithm (BMCA) which is performed on the AVB network to select a network Grand Master Clock.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a mbr 09/19/08 First release 1.01a mbr 06/24/09 PTP frame format updates for IEEE802.1 AS draft 5-0 2_02a mbr 09/16/09 Updates for programmable PTP timers 2_04a kag 07/23/10 PTP frame format updates for IEEE802.1 AS draft 6-7 3_01a kag 08/29/11 Added new APIs to update the RX Filter Control Reg. Fix for CR:572539. Updated bit map for Rx Filter control reg.
